task_completion.description: Create the required layers with correct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the LibreCAD layer list (usually on the right side), verify the existence of three layers: 'TEMPLATE' (Color: White/Black), 'COPING' (Color: Red), and 'DIMENSIONS' (Color: Cyan).

task_completion.description: Draw the ramp profile on the TEMPLATE layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main drawing area, look for a white/black outline of a quarter pipe. It should have an arc curving upwards from bottom-left to top-right, a horizontal line extending right from the top of the arc, a vertical line going down, and a horizontal line returning to the start.

task_completion.description: Draw the coping circle on the COPING layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a small red circle located at the top lip of the ramp, exactly where the arc and the top horizontal line meet.

task_completion.description: Add dimensions to the drawing on the DIMENSIONS layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for cyan-colored dimension lines and text in the drawing. There should be a vertical dimension showing '1800', a horizontal dimension showing '600' for the top deck, and a radial dimension showing 'R1800' (or similar) pointing to the arc.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing as a DXF file in the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the LibreCAD window title bar or a 'Save As' dialog to confirm the file is named 'quarter_pipe.dxf' and is located in '/home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the LibreCAD GUI to create the drawing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application open with the drawing being actively constructed using its tools, rather than a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the LibreCAD canvas to draw the shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show LibreCAD crosshairs, selection handles, or command line inputs at the bottom of the LibreCAD window indicating manual drawing steps.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to generate the DXF file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands executing Python scripts or echoing DXF file contents directly to the output path.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The drawing must contain three layers: TEMPLATE (White/Black), COPING (Red), and DIMENSIONS (Cyan). The TEMPLATE layer contains an arc of radius 1800 and lines forming the ramp structure. The COPING layer contains a circle of radius 30 at the top lip. The DIMENSIONS layer contains a vertical dimension (1800), a horizontal dimension (600), and a radial dimension (1800). The file must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/quarter_pipe.dxf.
